architecture.summary: Routing layer added to existing sync pipeline (LivingDocsSync, sync-progress, ExternalIssueAutoCreator). Strategy pattern: centralized (default, current behavior) vs distributed (per-repo routing via childRepos config). No new services.

integrations.summary: GitHub REST API (per-repo owner/repo), Jira (per-projectKey), ADO (per-project). Config reads umbrella.childRepos[].sync.github|jira|ado. No new external services.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - backend-only feature, no UI. CLI flag --consolidate added to migrate-to-umbrella command.

performance.summary: N/A - config-driven routing, no performance-sensitive paths. Migration is a one-time CLI operation.

security.summary: N/A - uses existing credentials per repo. No new auth surfaces.

edge-cases.summary: Dry-run mode for consolidation (default). Duplicate handling: keep umbrella root, remove nested. Missing per-repo sync config falls back to global. Orphaned living docs handled alongside increments.
